summary: The context contains only StepSecurity harden-runner network-monitoring and infrastructure setup logs from the tail of the CI run. No Go test output, race-detector errors, or explicit failure messages are present. The log selection method fell back to 'tail' after the intermediate content was truncated, so the actual test failure output is not captured in this context.
root_cause: The actual test failure output is absent from the context. The log was captured using the 'tail' fallback method after intermediate content was truncated, meaning any race-detector failures, test assertions, or compile errors that caused the job to fail are not visible here.

evidence.reason: The log was captured from the tail of the run, not the section containing test execution output or failure messages.
The intermediate (middle) portion of the log was truncated, which is where Go test output and race-detector failures would appear.
The log ends with orphan process cleanup, consistent with a job that exited abnormally, but does not indicate the specific cause.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
